name: chitchatter
tagline: A peer-to-peer chat application running directly in the browser
description: Chitchatter is a self-hosted, peer-to-peer chat client that works directly in the browser without servers. It uses WebRTC for secure and decentralized communications and requires no login or signup.

features.title: End-to-End Encryption
features.description: Messages are securely encrypted between users

features.title: Ephemeral Messages
features.description: Messages disappear after being viewed or after a time

features.title: Audio & Video Calls
features.description: Supports secure voice and video communication

features.title: Browser File Sharing
features.description: Transfer files directly through the browser

features.title: Self-Hosted Open Source
features.description: Fully open-source and deployable on your own infrastructure
